svg.title: BMRC filesystem layout
svg.desc: Structural diagram: home directory /users/group/user with a strict 10 GB quota; /well/group/ working area containing shared projects/archive and individual users/username/ workspaces with devel/ and work/ subdirectories; /well/sansom/shared for cross-institute collaboration.

tspan.style: font-style:normal;font-variant:normal;font-weight:600;font-stretch:normal;font-family:'FiraCode Nerd Font Mono';-inkscape-font-specification:'FiraCode Nerd Font Mono Semi-Bold'

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should I store in /well/group/projects on BMRC? What is the difference between projects/ and archive/?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in my /well/group/users/username/ directory on BMRC? What is the difference between devel/ and work/?')
sendPrompt('How should I use the archive/ directory on BMRC? Who can access it and is it backed up?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in devel/ on BMRC? Is it backed up and is it symlinked from home?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in work/ on BMRC? Is it symlinked from home?')
sendPrompt('Why is there a strict 10 GB quota on the BMRC home directory? What can go wrong if I work there?')
g.text: Strict 10 GB quota · do not work here

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I collaborate with groups outside KIR on BMRC? What is /well/sansom/shared?')
g.text: Cross-institute collaboration · contact Research Computing Manager to set up access
